kw.name: Setup Test Environment
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.msg: Connect to DB using : psycopg2.connect(database='postgres', user='postgres', password=***, host='localhost', port=5432)
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.
สร้าง Session HTTP และเชื่อมต่อ Database ตอนเริ่มเทสต์

test.name: TC-1.1: Verify AUTH Log Generation

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '55', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "admin@example.com", "password": "123456789"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Query
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
SELECT "logType" FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;

Query returned 1 rows
RowlogType
0AUTH
kw.arg: SELECT "logType" FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;
kw.doc: Runs a query with the ``select_statement`` and returns the result as list of rows. The type of row values depends on the database module - usually they are tuples or tuple-like objects.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: ทดสอบว่าการ Login จะสร้าง Log ประเภท AUTH

test.name: TC-1.2: Verify BEHAVIOR Log Generation

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users/me path_url=/api/users/me headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbWxrcHh0MTYwMDAwbTYyYXc1bXVhd3I2Iiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNTY2ODgxLCJleHAiOjE4MDUxMjQ0ODF9.yM5o8D8frgvCZ-1ls6V0_A7MCIzWpJRysJpFsEaIVC0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Query
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
SELECT "logType" FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;

Query returned 1 rows
RowlogType
0BEHAVIOR
kw.arg: SELECT "logType" FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;
kw.doc: Runs a query with the ``select_statement`` and returns the result as list of rows. The type of row values depends on the database module - usually they are tuples or tuple-like objects.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: ทดสอบว่าการเรียกดูข้อมูล (GET) สร้าง Log ประเภท BEHAVIOR

test.name: TC-1.3: Verify TRANSACTION Log and Password Sanitization

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users/me path_url=/api/users/me headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbWxrcHh0MTYwMDAwbTYyYXc1bXVhd3I2Iiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNTY2ODgxLCJleHAiOjE4MDUxMjQ0ODF9.yM5o8D8frgvCZ-1ls6V0_A7MCIzWpJRysJpFsEaIVC0', 'Content-Length': '61', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"firstName": "RobotTest", "password": "SuperSecretPassword"}'
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Query
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
SELECT "details"::text FROM "SystemLog" WHERE "logType" = 'AUTH' ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;

Query returned 1 rows
Rowdetails
0{"ip": "::1", "method": "POST", "userId": null, "details": {"email": "admin@example.com", "password": "***REDACTED***"}, "logType": "AUTH", "endpoint": "/api/auth/login", "timestamp": "2026-03-15T09:28:01.763Z", "statusCode": 200}
kw.arg: SELECT "details"::text FROM "SystemLog" WHERE "logType" = 'AUTH' ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;
kw.doc: Runs a query with the ``select_statement`` and returns the result as list of rows. The type of row values depends on the database module - usually they are tuples or tuple-like objects.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: ทดสอบว่าการทำ PUT สร้าง TRANSACTION Log และเซ็นเซอร์รหัสผ่าน

test.name: TC-1.4: Verify SECURITY Log on Unauthorized Access

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/logs path_url=/api/logs headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Query
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
SELECT "logType" FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;

Query returned 1 rows
RowlogType
0SECURITY
kw.arg: SELECT "logType" FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;
kw.doc: Runs a query with the ``select_statement`` and returns the result as list of rows. The type of row values depends on the database module - usually they are tuples or tuple-like objects.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: ทดสอบว่าเข้าถึงโดยไม่มีสิทธิ์ จะเกิด SECURITY Log

test.name: TC-2.1: Admin Can Get All Logs

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users/admin/logs path_url=/api/users/admin/logs headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbWxrcHh0MTYwMDAwbTYyYXc1bXVhd3I2Iiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNTY2ODgxLCJleHAiOjE4MDUxMjQ0ODF9.yM5o8D8frgvCZ-1ls6V0_A7MCIzWpJRysJpFsEaIVC0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.doc: แอดมินดึงข้อมูล Log ได้ และดึง ID ล่าสุดมาใช้ใน TC ถัดไป

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: TC-3.1: User Cannot Access Admin Logs

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users/admin/logs path_url=/api/users/admin/logs headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer invalid_or_user_token'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

test.doc: จำกัดสิทธิ์ User ไม่ให้เข้าถึง API ของแอดมิน (RBAC Test)

test.name: TC-3.2: Verify Valid Log HMAC

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users/me path_url=/api/users/me headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbWxrcHh0MTYwMDAwbTYyYXc1bXVhd3I2Iiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNTY2ODgxLCJleHAiOjE4MDUxMjQ0ODF9.yM5o8D8frgvCZ-1ls6V0_A7MCIzWpJRysJpFsEaIVC0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Query
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
SELECT id FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;

Query returned 1 rows
Rowid
01096
kw.arg: SELECT id FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;
kw.doc: Runs a query with the ``select_statement`` and returns the result as list of rows. The type of row values depends on the database module - usually they are tuples or tuple-like objects.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: ทดสอบ Verify ข้อมูล Log ที่ยังไม่ถูกแก้ไข (ต้องผ่าน)

test.name: TC-3.3: Tamper Detection (HMAC Catching Payload Modification)

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
UPDATE "SystemLog" SET "details" = '{"tampered": true}' WHERE id = '1092';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Not Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is true.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: จำลองการแฮกแก้ข้อมูลเนื้อหา Log (แก้คอลัมน์ details ที่ใช้คำนวณ Hash)

test.name: TC-3.4: Tamper Detection (HMAC Catching Hash Modification)

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
UPDATE "SystemLog" SET "logHash" = 'fake_hash_123456789abcdef' WHERE id = '1092';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Not Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is true.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
DELETE FROM "SystemLog" WHERE id = '1092';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

test.doc: จำลองการแฮกโดยการเดา/เปลี่ยนค่า Hash โดยตรงใน Database

test.name: TC-3.5: Verify All Logs in First Page

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Continue For Loop If
kw.doc: Skips the current FOR loop iteration if the ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.name: TC-4.1: Admin Can Export Logs to CSV

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/logs/export path_url=/api/logs/export headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbWxrcHh0MTYwMDAwbTYyYXc1bXVhd3I2Iiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNTY2ODgxLCJleHAiOjE4MDUxMjQ0ODF9.yM5o8D8frgvCZ-1ls6V0_A7MCIzWpJRysJpFsEaIVC0'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/logs/export status=200, reason=OK headers={'Vary': 'Origin', 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials': 'true', 'Access-Control-Expose-Headers': 'Content-Disposition', 'Content-Security-Policy': "default-src 'self';base-uri 'self';font-src 'self' https: data:;form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';img-src 'self' data:;object-src 'none';script-src 'self';script-src-attr 'none';style-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline';upgrade-insecure-requests", 'Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy': 'same-origin', 'Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy': 'same-origin', 'Origin-Agent-Cluster': '?1', 'Referrer-Policy': 'no-referrer', 'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=15552000; includeSubDomains', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'X-DNS-Prefetch-Control': 'off', 'X-Download-Options': 'noopen', 'X-Frame-Options': 'SAMEORIGIN', 'X-Permitted-Cross-Domain-Policies': 'none', 'X-XSS-Protection': '0', 'Content-Type': 'text/csv; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Disposition': 'attachment; filename="admin123_2026-03-15.csv"', 'Content-Length': '2473', 'ETag': 'W/"9a9-j5xJS1f7qwpMC3VpP3OOxnQYEnE"', 'Date': 'Sun, 15 Mar 2026 09:28:05 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body="Section","username","email","firstName","lastName","gender","phoneNumber","role","LogID","LogType","Action","Method","Endpoint","StatusCode","DateTime" "Personal","admin123","admin@example.com","RobotTest","Administrator","","","ADMIN",1101,"SECURITY","GET /api/users/admin/logs/1091/verify","GET","/api/users/admin/logs/1091/verify",200,"2026-03-15T09:28:05.934Z" "Personal","admin123","admin@example.com","RobotTest","Administrator","","","ADMIN",1100,"SECURITY","GET /api/users/admin/logs?logType=TRANSACTION&limit=100","GET","/api/users/admin/logs?logType=TRANSACTION&limit=100",200,"2026-03-15T09:28:05.927Z" "Personal","admin123","admin@example.com","RobotTest","Administrator","","","ADMIN",1099,"SECURITY","GET /api/users/admin/logs/1092/verify","GET","/api/users/admin/logs/1092/verify",200,"2026-03-15T09:28:05.917Z" "Personal","admin123","admin@example.com","RobotTest","Administrator","","","ADMIN",1098,"SECURITY","GET /api/users/admin/logs/1092/verify","GET","/api/users/admin/logs/1092/verify",200,"2026-03-15T09:28:05.908Z" "Personal","admin123","admin@example.com","RobotTest","Administrator","","","ADMIN",1097,"SECURITY","GET /api/users/admin/logs/1096/verify","GET","/api/users/admin/logs/1096/verify",200,"2026-03-15T09:28:05.898Z" "Personal","admin123","admin@example.com","RobotTest","Administrator","","","ADMIN",1096,"BEHAVIOR","GET /api/users/me","GET","/api/users/me",200,"2026-03-15T09:28:04.892Z" "Personal","","","","","","","",1095,"SECURITY","GET /api/users/admin/logs","GET","/api/users/admin/logs",401,"2026-03-15T09:28:04.883Z" "Personal","admin123","admin@example.com","RobotTest","Administrator","","","ADMIN",1094,"SECURITY","GET /api/users/admin/logs?type=SECURITY&limit=100","GET","/api/users/admin/logs?type=SECURITY&limit=100",200,"2026-03-15T09:28:04.874Z" "Personal","admin123","admin@example.com","RobotTest","Administrator","","","ADMIN",1093,"SECURITY","GET /api/users/admin/logs","GET","/api/users/admin/logs",200,"2026-03-15T09:28:04.864Z" "Personal","admin123","admin@example.com","RobotTest","Administrator","","","ADMIN",1091,"TRANSACTION","PUT /api/users/me","PUT","/api/users/me",200,"2026-03-15T09:28:03.845Z" "Personal","admin123","admin@example.com","RobotTest","Administrator","","","ADMIN",1090,"BEHAVIOR","GET /api/users/me","GET","/api/users/me",200,"2026-03-15T09:28:02.835Z" "Personal","","","","","","","",1089,"AUTH","POST /api/auth/login","POST","/api/auth/login",200,"2026-03-15T09:28:01.763Z"
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: \nExport Verified: Found matching headers in CSV!
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: ทดสอบการดาวน์โหลดไฟล์ Log และตรวจสอบเนื้อหา

test.name: TC-5.1: Filter Logs by Date Range

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=Log ID ${log['id']} (Date: ${log_date}) หลุดกรอบเวลาที่ค้นหา!
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: ทดสอบการดึงข้อมูล Log โดยกรองจากช่วงวันที่ (dateFrom ถึง dateTo)

test.name: TC-5.2: Filter Logs by Date Range (Exclude Out-of-Range Data)

kw.name: Query
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
SELECT id FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;

Query returned 1 rows
Rowid
01103
kw.arg: SELECT id FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;
kw.doc: Runs a query with the ``select_statement`` and returns the result as list of rows. The type of row values depends on the database module - usually they are tuples or tuple-like objects.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
UPDATE "SystemLog" SET "createdAt" = '2020-01-01 10:00:00' WHERE id = '1103';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal As Strings
kw.arg: msg=บั๊ก! API ดึงข้อมูลนอกกรอบเวลามาด้วย
kw.doc: Fails if objects are equal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=Log ID ${log_id} (Date: ${log_date}) หลุดกรอบเวลาที่ค้นหา!
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
UPDATE "SystemLog" SET "createdAt" = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = '1103';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

test.doc: จำลองข้อมูลที่หลุดกรอบเวลา และทดสอบว่า API จะไม่ดึงข้อมูลนั้นมาให้

test.name: TC-5.3: Filter Logs by Multiple Log Types

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=เจอ Log ชนิดอื่นหลุดมา! (Log ID: ${log['id']}, Type: ${current_type})
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: ทดสอบการกรอง Log ด้วยประเภทหลายๆ แบบพร้อมกัน (เช่น SECURITY และ AUTH)

test.name: TC-6.1: Audit All Logs (Secure State)

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users/admin/logs/audit path_url=/api/users/admin/logs/audit headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbWxrcHh0MTYwMDAwbTYyYXc1bXVhd3I2Iiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNTY2ODgxLCJleHAiOjE4MDUxMjQ0ODF9.yM5o8D8frgvCZ-1ls6V0_A7MCIzWpJRysJpFsEaIVC0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Should Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is empty.

test.doc: ทดสอบ API สแกน Log ทั้งระบบ ในสถานะที่ไม่มีการโดนแฮก

test.name: TC-6.2: Audit All Logs (Detect Tampering)

kw.name: Query
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
SELECT id FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;

Query returned 1 rows
Rowid
01103
kw.arg: SELECT id FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1;
kw.doc: Runs a query with the ``select_statement`` and returns the result as list of rows. The type of row values depends on the database module - usually they are tuples or tuple-like objects.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
UPDATE "SystemLog" SET "logHash" = 'hacked_hash_123456789' , "details" = '{"tampered": true}' WHERE id = '1103';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users/admin/logs/audit path_url=/api/users/admin/logs/audit headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbWxrcHh0MTYwMDAwbTYyYXc1bXVhd3I2Iiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNTY2ODgxLCJleHAiOjE4MDUxMjQ0ODF9.yM5o8D8frgvCZ-1ls6V0_A7MCIzWpJRysJpFsEaIVC0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=Audit API หา Log ที่โดนแฮกไม่เจอ!
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
DELETE FROM "SystemLog" WHERE id = '1103';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

test.doc: จำลองการแฮกข้อมูล แล้วสั่ง Audit เพื่อดูว่าระบบตรวจเจอไหม

kw.name: Teardown Test Environment
Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
DELETE FROM "SystemLog" WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 17);
kw.arg: DELETE FROM "SystemLog" WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM "SystemLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 17);
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.doc: Disconnects from the database.
ปิด Session และยกเลิกการเชื่อมต่อ Database เมื่อเทสต์เสร็จ
